name: Treaty-Based Sourcing Election

eligibility.description: Applies to sales of stock in foreign corporations or intangibles where a U.S. treaty provides favorable sourcing rules.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to source gain from the sale of certain stock or intangibles outside the U.S. if a treaty obligation would otherwise source it that way.
